career.background: Started in circus performance before transitioning to photography and filmmaking

bio: Alaa "Regash" Aliabdallah is a Palestinian photographer and filmmaker based in Nablus, Palestine. Beginning his creative journey in circus performance with the Palestinian Circus School, he transitioned to photography in 2014 and has since built a career spanning documentary filmmaking, fashion photography, and creative direction. His work captures the vibrant cultural life of Palestine while bringing Palestinian stories to international audiences.
